packages.title: Kanyakumari Sunrise & Heritage
packages.description: Stand at the southernmost tip of mainland India. Witness the Confluence of three oceans and enjoy historical tours of Padmanabhapuram Palace.

packages.title: Ooty Botanic & Lake Getaway
packages.description: Known as the Queen of Hill Stations, enjoy Ooty's colonial heritage gardens, scenic viewpoints, and peaceful boating, accompanied by luxury private transport.

packages.title: Yercaud Emerald Escapes

packages.description: Discover Kodaikanal's countryside. Visit the terraced agriculture valleys of Poombarai village, walk around the grasslands of Mannavanur Lake, and tour animal farms.
packages.title: Tour No. 5 (Village Tour)

packages.description: A trekking trail for nature lovers. Hike to the famous Dolphin Nose rock ledge overlooking deep valley drops, hear echoes at the canyon, and cross streams.
packages.title: Tour No. 4 (Trekking Tour)

packages.description: Visit the massive Srirangam temple complex, the largest functioning temple in the world, and climb Trichy's historic Rockfort Temple for panoramic city views.
packages.title: Trichy Rockfort & Srirangam
Arupadaiveedu Murugan Temple Tour
packages.description: An executive group pilgrimage covering all six holy hill abodes of Lord Murugan across Tamil Nadu (Palani, Swamimalai, Thiruthani, Pazhamudircholai, Thiruparankundram, Thiruchendur).

packages.title: Madurai Meenakshi & Palace Heritage
packages.description: Step into the ancient city of Madurai. Experience the architecture of the Meenakshi Temple and enjoy local food tours in this legendary cultural hub.
Explore the holy island of Rameshwaram. Experience the spiritual bathing rituals at Ramanathaswamy Temple and drive to the abandoned town of Dhanushkodi.
packages.title: Rameshwaram & Dhanushkodi Island
Thekkady Wildlife & Spice Tour
packages.description: Journey into the heart of Kerala's Periyar forest. Observe wild elephants, learn about local spice farming, and enjoy private traditional cultural performances.

packages.title: Tirupati Balaji VIP Pilgrimage
packages.description: Experience a stress-free pilgrimage to the world-famous Lord Venkateswara temple in Tirupati, featuring pre-arranged VIP entry and luxury hill transit.
Unwind in the mist-laden hills of Munnar. Explore sprawling tea plantations, scenic waterfalls, and experience premium resort luxury in Kerala's premier hill country.
packages.title: Munnar Hills & Tea Estates
Tour No. 3 (Wild Tour)
packages.description: Venture deep into Kodaikanal's protected forest zones. Experience the serene beauty of Berijam Lake and high-altitude wild pine views under a special forest permit.
